case_for: Patterson retains some big-play upside as a change-of-pace back and kick returner, so a long touchdown or return score could theoretically push him past 12 points.
case_against: His role has clearly diminished, with recent usage yielding near-zero production (wk10-wk12 averaging under 1 point) and a pregame projection of essentially zero expected points, indicating minimal touches and no clear path to fantasy relevance.
